word: H3445 - יֶשַׁח - yeshach - yeh'-shakh - Casting down

sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׁח

Transliteration: yeshach

Phonetic: yeh'-shakh

BDB Definition:

  1. a sinking feeling, emptiness

Origin: from an unused root meaning to gape (as the empty stomach)

TWOT entry: 924

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
